name: Captain Power and the Soldiers of the Future
original_name: Captain Power and the Soldiers of the Future
overview: Captain Power and the Soldiers of the Future is a 1987–88 Canadian-American science fiction/action television series, merging live action with animation based on computer-generated images, that ran for 22 episodes in Canadian and American syndication.

trailers.title: Captain Power and the Soldiers of the Future Opening
